children.name: Sunset Grill
children.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

children.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
children.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

children.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
children.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

children.name: Ripley's Aquarium
children.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

children.name: The Keg Steakhouse
children.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

children.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
children.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

children.name: Elements on the Falls
children.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

children.name: Antler Kitchen
children.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

children.name: YYZ Airport Arrival
children.description: Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged.

children.name: Harbourfront Stroll
children.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

children.name: Canoe Restaurant
children.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.
